---
agent: agent
argument-hint: Add an entry to the CHANGELOG.md file for the changes made.
description: Add an entry to the CHANGELOG.md file for the changes made.
---

Study README.md. Study CHANGELOG.md. Run a diff between this branch and the main branch. Add an entry under `## [Unreleased]` for the changes made. Be succinct, straight to the point, word the entry clearly for users, be explicit about the "symptom" that was addressed. Adapt README.md as well if necessary to reflect any user-facing changes.
